overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking from a coastal restaurant parking lot, through a covered outdoor patio, and then along a highway shoulder at dusk. The environment features rocky coastal terrain, palm trees, and light vehicle traffic against a darkening blue sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through empty parking lot toward building entrance

entered.detail: dark asphalt surface with white parking lines
bright yellow protective posts near building entrance
tall palm trees silhouetted against dusk sky

large rocky hill rising behind the building

segments.scene_description: Walking through an empty coastal parking lot at dusk, approaching a modern commercial building with palm trees and rocky terrain visible against the darkening blue sky.

approaches patio exit leading to coastal highway

segments.scene_description: Walking under a wooden pergola through an empty outdoor dining patio with picnic tables, passing a colorful vending machine and trash bins, with the highway visible beyond the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway shoulder with rocky cliffs

events.description: exits covered patio and turns onto highway shoulder

segments.scene_description: Walking along the shoulder of a coastal highway at dusk, with steep rocky cliffs on the left and the ocean visible ahead. Vehicles including a white sedan and red truck pass by on the multi-lane road as street lights illuminate the twilight scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a quiet coastal parking lot into the open expanse of a twilight highway. It begins by traversing an empty lot flanked by palm trees and rocky terrain under a deepening blue sky, moving steadily toward a modern commercial building. As the camera enters the building's perimeter, the scene shifts beneath a wooden pergola and through an outdoor dining patio filled with picnic tables and a colorful vending machine. The perspective then emerges from the patio to follow the shoulder of a coastal highway, where the environment opens up to reveal steep rocky cliffs and the distant ocean. Finally, the camera glides past passing vehicles, including a white sedan and a red truck, as street lights begin to illuminate the darkening roadside.
